name: animated-number
description: Number component with smooth counting animations and customizable formatting

registry_item.name: animated-number
registry_item.description: Number component with smooth counting animations and customizable formatting

visual_summary: An animated span that displays a numeric value with a spring-based animation effect, commonly used when showing a count that changes dynamically.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: animated-number
Description: An animated span that displays a numeric value with a spring-based animation effect, commonly used when showing a count that changes dynamically.
Style: minimal
Interactions: animated
Tags: animation, interactive, number

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

}
